title: I built an automated productivity system (Telegram –> Notion)
abstract:
I built a system that captures notes/ideas/tasks in Telegram and auto-triages into an organised Notion workspace. Offering 5 free builds.

I built this system for myself initially to help me keep track of the many projects I work on. It lets me quickly capture tasks and ideas without fric
abstract_zh:
我构建了一个系统，可以在Telegram中捕捉笔记/想法/任务，并自动分类到组织化的Notion工作区中。提供5个免费版本。

最初我是为自己开发这个系统的，帮助我跟踪众多项目。它可以让我快速记录任务和想法，减少摩擦。
